About Us

Rooted in community, growing together.

Who We Are

At Children of Promise we serve the needs of families in our own town of Millstadt and surrounding communities. We are located within 10 miles from the center of Belleville, Dupo, and Cahokia Heights.

We are located on 9 beautiful acres of property in Millstadt, IL allowing us the space to provide outdoor activities in addition to our early childhood program.

We have programs for birth to three, pre-school, and a before and afterschool / summer program.

Our Programs

🍼

Infant & Toddler

Nurturing care for children from birth through age three.

🎨

Pre-School

Developmentally appropriate learning for 3 and 4 year olds.

🏫

Before & Afterschool

Safe, enriching care before and after the school day, plus summer program.

Contact Us

If you are interested in inquiring about our center please fill out the Pre-Enrollment form or call us and we will be happy to answer any questions.
